notableEvents.label: Geraldo Perdomo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo grounds into a double play, first baseman Royce Lewis to shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Royce Lewis. Ketel Marte out at 2nd. Geraldo Perdomo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ildemaro Vargas reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Trevor Larnach. Ildemaro Vargas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Alex Jackson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Ryan Kreidler scores. Josh Bell scores. Alex Jackson to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Corbin Carroll.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Jackson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Ryan Kreidler scores. Josh Bell scores. Alex Jackson to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Corbin Carroll.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Trevor Larnach. Ildemaro Vargas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Bell pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jorge Barrosa. Royce Lewis scores. Ryan Kreidler to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Alex Jackson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Ryan Kreidler scores. Josh Bell scores. Alex Jackson to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Corbin Carroll.
